title: Spiced Date Crumble
description: A sweet and spicy dessert featuring poached dates in a crunchy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: crumble
ingredients.notes: all-purpose flour and cold butter mixture

instructions: 2. Grease a 6-inch square baking dish with ghee or oil.
3. Arrange the pitted dates in the prepared baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the ground peppercorn over the dates.
5. Prepare the crumble topping by mixing the crumble mixture in a bowl until it resembles coarse crumbs.
6. Spread the crumble topping evenly over the dates.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
